review_title: SMS-iT is a MUST for all marketers.
author: Ronnie S.
pros: SMS-iT is the best SaaS software I have purchased so far. It's the perfect solution for my business, from finding prospects and converting them into clients to retaining existing clients by keeping them engaged and updated with my business. What amazes me most is the rockstar community that is very involved in supporting each other and providing great feedback and suggestions to improve the product further. The weekly webinars are insightful and focus on helping businesses grow using the product. The price? You won't believe it is so inexpensive, given the value you can get from the product. If there's one marketing tool you need to have, it should definitely be SMS-iT!
cons: More of a need for a customized experience. Good thing is, the community and SMS-iT are constantly coordinating to further improve the product and its service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is the Real Deal SMS Marketing Platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I had a Zoom walkthrough today with [SENSITIVE CONTENT] to get the platform set up for me. I was blown away by his understanding of my needs as a marketing services agency. For my particular use case, [SENSITIVE CONTENT] set up some demos that we tested on my own mobile device and they were "spot on" with exactly what I needed. This platform is super robust with features that I don't currently need, but as I scale my agency offerings, I surely will have a need for them down the road. Can't wait for the next release (2.0), which will include "dynamic" QR codes and some other bells and whistles. I found that [SENSITIVE CONTENT] is totally legit and is also a registered business with the FCC - [SENSITIVE CONTENT] [SENSITIVE CONTENT] - You rock bro! Thanks for the awesome and valuable 90 minutes on Zoom to learn the basics and some of the advanced features of your amazing platform.
cons: Dynamic QR codes are not available yet, but will be included with the 2.0 release :-)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: BEWARE - Dishonet, Deceiptful And Completely Lacking Integrity.
description: They are a start-up which is fair enough, if they communicated this i would be more understanding. but to outright lie about your products capability, lying about leting me know it being some sort of special grandfather offer ect to try make themselves look honorable.Do not trust these crooks with your business, data or in any other reason.
author: Esat H.
pros: I did not get to use the service well as the help centre did not work, the chat support was down, and functions did not work as advertised. The marketing worked, i got sucked in.
cons: They have advertised on the main site the integrations of the service, I signed up and after a few days of trying to speak to someone as the help centre chat ect was down got told the integrations advertised on the website are not yet working.I then requested to have my account paused until this is working, I was told this was not an option.I got told I could request a refund then once i did was told they do not offer refunds?? Even though they are advertising features on the website that are not working.THE ACTIVE CAMPAIGN LOGO IS ON THEIR LANDING PAGE, THERE IS NO WARNING OR NOTE OF THIS NOT WORKING. I then requested to have the account paused and ill try to resume this when its operational. was told no again, also that if I canceled my plan next time when the features are live the price would be more than double so pretty much a threating or stronge-arming me to stay.So not only can i not get a refund of money for a service which is adversited but is not currently operational.They lied in a reply to my review. you can email me and i will send you the transcript proving their public lie.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and genius programmer behind the scenes (remember the wizard behind the curtain in the Wizard of Oz) still manages to be *very* present for customer questions and issues. He's so brilliant, sometimes his answers go whizzing over my head! Then again, I also know that [SENSITIVE CONTENT] brings you back down to earth when you try to overcomplicate something that has a simple solution.If you have, or want to have, the younger generations as customers/clients, sms marketing via SMS-iT is seriously something you should consider and then act on! Be proactive rather than reactive! After all, the times, they are a-changin' - don't get left behind. SMS-iT represents the future of omni-channel marketing, allowing you to be everywhere your customers are.
author: Kristin D.
pros: I started out using the Decentralized version but have finally begun to get into the Cloud version. My biggest pro for the Cloud version is that it is less of a hassle to use since you're using SMS-iT's resources as opposed to those of a third party like Twilio. I also like the user interface, but having seen a preview, I am eagerly waiting for version 2.0, which looks even better!Customer support is pretty friendly and prompt. I have only had 1 instance where I felt like we were going round in circles. Also, they are quick to let you know when they have to forward your issue to the tech department.
cons: Sometimes, after waiting for Customer Support, they have to turn the problem over to Tech Support, so sometimes it takes longer than 24 hours for them to resolve it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: SMS-IT is a cloud-based SMS customer engagement platform that helps businesses to better understand and engage with their customers through text messaging. SMS-IT provides a variety of features including powerful text messaging analytics, real-time customer insights, and powerful customer management tools. SMS-IT helps businesses to improve customer engagement, increase customer loyalty, and reduce customer churn. You'll be shocked by the new features of V2.0. We're really looking forward to this release!
author: Kheir B.
pros: The interface of the platform is very user-friendly. I loved the Smart Tools and how to use them. The price of the plan is so cheap compared to other text messaging platforms. The customer service of SMS-iT team is very responsive.
cons: It may sometimes feel like the service is lagging, but this is understandable and can be fixed by the Tech Team.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: SMS-iT a powerful way to get new lead.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SMS-iT helps us to develop multi-way communications to reach our new customers.
cons: I wish SMS-iT can do drip campaigns using SMS as well
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Erick S.
pros: I love this app because it is a one-stop shop for marketing automation. It is so easy to use and has amazing features that are important for my business. I love that I have the option to send messages to my contacts or my leads, and the app will automatically find out who you're talking too. I love that I can have a branded text message or a generic text message, depending on my needs. The price is also very affordable for the amount of services that I get. I also love that I can track my campaign performance with the software and see who responded and why.
cons: not sure, I know V2 coming out soon so it can only get better
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: This is one slick SMS platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This SMS platform is exceptional! It offers a wide range of features, including SMS sending, polling, QR codes, and automated campaigns. What sets it apart is the high impact of text messages - people rarely miss them, unlike social media posts, emails, or Google ads. Highly recommended for effective audience reach!
cons: A little tricky to configure and the documentation seems to mostly be long, boring webinars
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SMS-iT is capable of a lot!
description: Other than the iPhone compatibility being a nuisance I think it is OK!
author: Kristen C.
pros: you have the ability to build a sms system exactly as wanted. Also it has a lot of options for customization. The reporting is great too
cons: Not able to use SMS-iT on an iPhone like you can with an android. I ended up connecting Twilio to it on my iPhone but if I had an android I would not needed to use Twilio as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I can use their service to send SMS in my own system with code and not only marketing.

description: The team behing it is fantástic, everything works and the support is great!

review_title: Best tool for sending emails and SMS like a genius!
description: Sending emails and sms was a priority for me. But I did not have the tool for it. Now I do and I am extremely happy for this. The tool does even voice broadcasts and even fax, to reach non-updated companies. So this is great news for anyone trying to reach customers.

cons: UI was not very intuitive, but was changed recently. Nothing bad to say, I am still learning all the features and I am not using all of them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
